positive: A stylized celestial map design: an intricate, modern representation of constellations and nebulae forming a vibrant, abstract mural. The main elements include clean, interconnected geometric lines, glowing gold filigree connecting various stylized zodiac animals (e.g., a minimalist depiction of the Lion, the Serpent, the Archer). The background is deep space indigo and midnight blue, contrasted by ethereal gradients of cyan, magenta, and teal. The composition is centrally arranged, suitable for placement on clothing. Lighting is soft, luminous internal glow (bioluminescent effect), emphasizing high contrast and clean silhouettes. Style: Art Nouveau meets Modern Minimalism, suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Highly detailed, symmetrical, vector-art quality, optimized for apparel transfer.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, ugly, amateur, dirty, grainy, excessive detail, photorealism, messy, blood, writing, people
